titles.title: h-NUMO: A high-performance discontinuous-Galerkin code for hydrostatic ocean modelling

institution.institution_name: Center for Ocean and Atmospheric Studies, Florida State University, FL, USA
Department of Mathematics, Boise State University, ID, USA

citation.article_title: Efficient construction of unified continuous and discontinuous Galerkin formulations for the 3D Euler equations
citation.author: Abdi
citation.unstructured_citation: Abdi, D. S., & Giraldo, F. X. (2016). Efficient construction of unified continuous and discontinuous Galerkin formulations for the 3D Euler equations. Journal of Computational Physics, 320, 46–68. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jcp.2016.05.033

citation.article_title: Non-hydrostatic unified model of the ocean with application to ice/ocean interaction modeling
citation.author: Kopera
citation.unstructured_citation: Kopera, M. A., Gahounzo, Y., Enderlin, E. M., Giraldo, F. X., & Maslowski, W. (2023). Non-hydrostatic unified model of the ocean with application to ice/ocean interaction modeling. GEM-International Journal on Geomathematics, 14(1), 2. https://doi.org/10.1007/s13137-022-00212-7

citation.article_title: High-order discontinuous element-based schemes for the inviscid shallow water equations: Spectral multidomain penalty and discontinuous Galerkin methods
citation.author: Escobar-Vargas
citation.unstructured_citation: Escobar-Vargas, J. A., Diamessis, P. J., & Giraldo, F. X. (2012). High-order discontinuous element-based schemes for the inviscid shallow water equations: Spectral multidomain penalty and discontinuous Galerkin methods. Applied Mathematics and Computation, 218(9), 4825–4848. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.amc.2011.10.046

citation.author: Griffies
citation.unstructured_citation: Griffies, S. M., Böning, C., Bryan, F. O., Chassignet, E. P., Gerdes, R., Hasumi, H., Hirst, A., Treguier, A.-M., & Webb, D. (2000). Developments in ocean climate modelling. Ocean Modelling, 2(3), 123–192. https://doi.org/10.1016/S1463-5003(00)00014-7

citation.article_title: Generalized Vertical Coordinates for Eddy-Resolving Global and Coastal Ocean Forecasts
citation.author: Chassignet
citation.unstructured_citation: Chassignet, E. P., Hurlburt, H. E., Smedstad, O. M., Halliwell, G. R., Wallcraft, A. J., Metzger, E. J., Blanton, B. O., Lozano, C., Rao, D. B., Hogan, P. J., & Srinivasan, A. (2006). Generalized Vertical Coordinates for Eddy-Resolving Global and Coastal Ocean Forecasts. Oceanography, 19(1), 118–129. https://doi.org/10.5670/oceanog.2006.95

citation.article_title: Multiple time scales and pressure forcing in discontinuous Galerkin approximations to layered ocean models
citation.author: Higdon
citation.unstructured_citation: Higdon, R. L. (2015). Multiple time scales and pressure forcing in discontinuous Galerkin approximations to layered ocean models. Journal of Computational Physics, 295, 230–260. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jcp.2015.04.010

citation.article_title: Global Optimization of Explicit Strong-Stability-Preserving Runge-Kutta Methods
citation.author: Ruuth
citation.unstructured_citation: Ruuth, S. J. (2006). Global Optimization of Explicit Strong-Stability-Preserving Runge-Kutta Methods. Mathematics of Computation, 75(253), 183–207. https://doi.org/10.1090/S0025-5718-05-01772-2

citation.article_title: Gmsh: A 3-D finite element mesh generator with built-in pre- and post-processing facilities
citation.author: Geuzaine
citation.journal_title: International Journal for Numerical Methods in Engineering
citation.unstructured_citation: Geuzaine, C., & Remacle, J.-F. (2009). Gmsh: A 3-D finite element mesh generator with built-in pre- and post-processing facilities. International Journal for Numerical Methods in Engineering, 79(11), 1309–1331. https://doi.org/10.1002/nme.2579

citation.article_title: High-order discontinuous Galerkin schemes for the barotropic-baroclinic splitting in two-dimensional layered shallow water equations
citation.author: Gahounzo
citation.unstructured_citation: Gahounzo, Y., Kopera, M., Higdon, R. L., Chassignet, E. P., Wallcraft, A., & Bozec, A. (2026). High-order discontinuous Galerkin schemes for the barotropic-baroclinic splitting in two-dimensional layered shallow water equations. Journal of Computational Physics, 545, 114496. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jcp.2025.114496
